description_long: This is a young adult woman with a slim build, dressed in modern athletic wear suitable for urban environments. She wears a sleeveless, fitted top with a diagonal strap detail and cropped leggings, both featuring angular design accents. Her right arm is adorned with a visible tattoo sleeve, and she has a fingerless glove or wrist guard on her left forearm, suggesting a sporty or active lifestyle. Her footwear consists of lightweight, slip-on shoes designed for agility. The figure's hair is styled in a medium-length, layered cut that partially covers her face, giving her a dynamic and contemporary appearance. The overall look is functional yet stylish, blending elements of street fashion and athletic gear.
description: A young woman in modern athletic wear with a tattooed arm, fingerless glove, and layered medium-length hair, exuding a sporty urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, tattooed right arm, fingerless glove on the left, and layered hair partially covering the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the glove, the angular design of the top and leggings, and the profile of the layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back strap detail, the fit of the top and leggings, and the full extent of the tattoo on the right arm.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the tattoo sleeve, the wrist guard, and the athletic cut of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless athletic top with angular accents, cropped leggings, fingerless glove, and wrist guard
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length layered hair with side-swept bangs
